title: map fixed length to variable
text: map fixed length to variable Map fields with a fixed length storage format (CHAR) to a variable length storage format. USYS$ORA_PARAMS = map fixed length to variable USYS$ORA_PARAMS = fv Description This setting can greatly reduce the disk space required for large table sets. However, it may also reduce the database performance by 20%-50%. This setting maps the Oracle storage format CHAR to VARCHAR2 . Related Links Oracle Data Packing Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
